smg.text: Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. Showers, heavy at first. Force 2 to 4 southeasterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers at first. Force 2 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. One or two showers. Force 2 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
Very hot. Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
Very hot. Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
Very hot. Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers later. Force 2 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few thundery showers. Force 2 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
